generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "360-degree LiDAR sensor for point cloud data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera for depth perception and 3D scene reconstruction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring real-time vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring real-time steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package running on vehicle hardware for preprocessing sensor data"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud-based ROS2 package for digital twin processing"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "UI-based ROS2 package for user interaction"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator controlled by Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for speed regulation"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for angular adjustments"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANModel
]

instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object track timeseries data derived from LiDAR processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking over time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic for speed adjustment based on object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication and real-time data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ObjectTracks3DVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime environment for scripting and model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler and runtime for high-performance computing tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTracks3DVisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent storage of vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeDataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring and reporting service for vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading for Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationOffload
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service for ACC control and vehicle operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmd, DisableACCCmd, SetDesiredSpeedCmd, EmergencyBrakingCmd
]

instance ObjectTracks3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service for object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracks3DView
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle speed and steering angle for driver awareness"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of object tracks for enhanced situational awareness"
]

instance ACCComputationOffload : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading for ACC system to reduce onboard processing load"
]

instance EnableACCCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to enable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ObjectTracks3DView : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and vehicle state for driver trust enhancement"
]

instance PhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance CloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, SQLDatabase
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Motor voltage commands for speed control and steering servo commands generated by the Actuation FE in the Digital Twin Entity, transmitted over Wi-Fi to the Physical Twin Entity for vehicle actuation; emergency braking commands also executed via this channel."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and synchronized clocks across components with ±100 ms accuracy."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (on-vehicle sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing, ACC logic), User Entity (UI), and Data Translation FE (inter-entity protocol translation), interconnected via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for vehicle control and monitoring, supporting real-time ADAS functions during vehicle operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; OPC UA (IEC 62541) for Data Translation FE protocol translation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and Jetson NX onboard vehicle; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity deployed on external systems; SQL database on remote server."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency."
]
